title: dianthus × burciae
intro: Dianthus × burciae, also known as the Burcia's Pink, is a hybrid plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe. The plant is rich in flavonoids, coumarins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dianthus × burciae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall well-being.
